record.field: company, history, who we are, made in italy, family, calabria

CasaFolino is a family-owned Italian gourmet food company with roots dating to 1962. The brand focuses on authentic Italian Mediterranean products, high-quality ingredients, traceability, sustainability and practical gourmet formats. Production site: Italy, Calabria.
products, catalog, categories, spreads, risotto, honey, spices, mousse, chili, biscuits, cantucci, chocolate

CasaFolino product categories include spreadable creams, crunchy creams, flavored honeys, ready risottos with Sibari rice, Italian spice mixes, gastronomic mousses, crispy chilli, biscuits, cantucci, chocolate bars, chocolate chunks, organic/Bio products and gift boxes.
formats, grams, packaging, jar, glass, box, pallet, shelf life, private label

Known retail formats: spreadable creams 220 g; ready risottos 200 g; flavored honeys 250 g; spice mixes 80 g; gastronomic mousses 220 g; crispy chilli 190 g; biscuits and cantucci about 210-260 g; chocolate bars and chunks about 220-250 g. Packaging includes glass jars, retail-ready formats, bulk solutions, customized packaging, gift boxes and private label packaging.
certifications, brc, ifs, organic, bio, kosher, halal, rex, food safety, compliance

CasaFolino communicates certifications including BRC, IFS, Organic/Bio, Kosher, Halal and Rex. These support food safety, quality, traceability and export readiness. If a caller asks for certificates or technical documents, the agent should create a callback or email activity for the responsible team rather than inventing document details.
production, capacity, operations, jars per day, lead time, moq, scalability

Current daily production capacity indicated in the company profile: spreadable cream line 10,000-15,000 jars/day; honey line 10,000-15,000 jars/day; mousse line 8,000-10,000 jars/day; crispy chilli line 8,000-10,000 jars/day; ready-to-cook risotto and dry mix line 7,000-9,000 jars/day. MOQ is flexible and adaptable by product category and market. Annual capacity is scalable by demand and project planning.
markets, export, countries, channels, distributors, wholesalers, ecommerce, gdo

CasaFolino is export-oriented and operates through direct sales, wholesalers, retailers, distributors and e-commerce. Countries/areas mentioned include Saudi Arabia, United States, Canada, Australia, Dubai, Morocco and Europe.
private label, custom recipes, custom product, brand, recipe, formulation, packaging

CasaFolino supports private label, custom product development, customized packaging and custom recipes. For private label or custom recipe requests, collect company name, contact, market/country, product category, expected volumes if known and requested timing, then create a commercial lead or callback.
price, availability, delivery, contract, payment, guarantee, quote, listino

The voice agent may describe product categories, known formats, certifications and general company positioning. It must not invent prices, stock availability, delivery dates, payment terms, contract terms or order changes. For those requests it must lookup the customer/order where allowed, create a note/activity/lead, or transfer to a human.
